code: import{useDispatch,useSelector}from"react-redux";import{useParams}from"react-router-dom";import{getStudentById}from"../redux/StudentAction";import{useEffect}from"react";import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";export function StudentDetails(){const{id}=useParams();const dispatch=useDispatch();const student=useSelector(state=>state.student.student);const loading=useSelector(state=>state.student.loading);const error=useSelector(state=>state.student.error);useEffect(()=>{dispatch(getStudentById(id));},[dispatch,id]);if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Loading..."});if(error)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:error});if(!student)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("h3",{children:["No student with this id: ",id]});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h1",{children:"Student Details"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Id: ",student.id]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Name: ",student.sname]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("p",{children:["Course: ",student.course]})]});}
